title: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ:SNDL) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: SNDL reported Q3 2023 earnings with Liquor Retail net revenue of $151.8 million for the third quarter of 2023, showing stable revenue compared to the same quarter in the prior year. Gross margin in the Liquor Retail segment was $37.3 million, or 24.5% of sales in Q3 2023, compared to $35.6 million, or 23.3% of sales, in Q3 2022. Private label sales increased by 33% compared to the third quarter of 2022 and 7% compared to the second quarter of 2023. The company expected to launch its first wine private label in the first half of 2024, featuring wine varietals sourced from distinguished regions and notable winemakers. In September, SNDL launched an e-commerce platform for its liquor retail banner Wine and Beyond, with a 121% increase in the average online basket spend compared to in-store purchases during the initial four weeks post-launch. The company finalized the structure of its liquor retail data program and expected to see results in the first quarter of 2024, with the launch expected to strengthen supplier partnerships and contribute to margin expansion.
